name: Employer has no workers comp insurance forklift accident now what Boise?
description: Direct lawsuit allowed; full damages possible.[3]

mainEntity.name: Employer has no workers comp insurance forklift accident now what Boise?

acceptedAnswer.text: Direct lawsuit allowed; full damages possible.[3]
acceptedAnswer.description: **Sue employer directly in tort for full damages—no exclusive remedy shield.** Idaho requires coverage.[3] Key factors: Verify uninsured status, file comp anyway (state fund may cover), then lawsuit. Higher recovery potential.[3]
